ifeval.description: Instruction-following evaluation — measures whether a model obeys explicit formatting and content instructions in prompts.

bbh.description: Big Bench Hard — a suite of 23 challenging reasoning tasks where prior models had been below human baseline.

math_lvl5.description: Hardest subset (level 5) of the MATH competition problem set — multi-step mathematical reasoning.

gpqa.description: Graduate-level Google-proof Q&A in physics, chemistry, and biology — tests deep domain knowledge.

musr.description: Multistep soft reasoning — narrative reasoning tasks requiring long-context inference.

mmlu_pro.description: Harder, more discriminative version of MMLU with 10 answer choices and less noise.

lmsys_elo.description: LMSYS Chatbot Arena Elo score derived from blind human pairwise preference votes.

mtbench.description: Multi-turn bench — LLM-judged preference scores on multi-turn conversations. LMSYS's non-Elo signal; emitted by the scraper only as a fallback when live Arena Elo is unreachable.
